title: chrysanthemum minimum
intro: Chrysanthemum minimum, also known as dwarf chrysanthemum or minimum chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its flavonoid and polysaccharide content. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum minimum include reducing fever, alleviating headache and sore throat, and promoting relaxation and sleep. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Chrysanthemum minimum are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
